by that sign. If this is guaranteed, the wife would bring fortune
and prosperity; otherwise i.e. if it is a Rasi containing very few
dots, there will be misery in respect of fortune and issue. In
our example, seven Rasis have 5 dots each. Of these seven the
better ones are his own house and exaltation. Here the exaltation
happens to be the Lagna. So if the native's partner be born in the
same Lagna or with the Moon in Pisces or Taurus the marriage
would prove fortunate. The directions, you know, are read
in two ways : One method is to take the Lagna and the next
three Ralis as the four cardinal points; and the other is
to take Aries and Taurus as the East. Gemini as south-east
and so on.

ASTAKAVARGA 283
Saturn's A.V, is made use of for finding out the time of the
subject's demise. Note the ^odhyapio^a of Saturn and multiply
it by the benetic dots, in his original A.V., found in the 8th
house counted from the Lagna. Then divide the product by
27.
